IBEW.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Indoor Locals — Wednesday, July 8, 2026**

**LU-481 Indianapolis, IN** is running hot with 43 calls chasing 187 hands. Ermco's Google Data Center Mooresville job is the anchor (30 spots, new construction, extensive background check required), but the real move is Meade Electric's Meta Data Center gig at **$53.80/hr — 10% over scale** — on a new-build with 14 openings. Industrial Electric and Electric Plus are also feeding Lebanon and Indianapolis with solid inside JW work, all new construction. Book depth is real here; this isn't soft.

**LU-494 Milwaukee, WI** has 38 calls but the Port Washington Data Center is the story: Gurtz, MJ Electric, and Uihlein are all reposting the same gig at **JW wage plus $10/hr base wage increase** — that's a hard premium in a repost situation. Pieper's got healthcare work with OT available. 175 hands on the books means selectivity.

**LU-683 Columbus, OH** sits at 24 calls, 111 hands, with Mid City leading 20 Inside JW spots at **$73.42/hr**. ESI's Cologix Data Center in Lewis Center (10 JW spots, same **$73.42/hr**) is legitimate; Kastle's tele/data call at $54.85 rounds out the board. Top scale here is **$80.76**.

**LU-124 Kansas City, MO** — 32 calls, 152 hands — is Google-heavy: Capital and Mark One both running Google NRD work (Inside JW rates, drug test + OSHA 10 mandatory). RS has KCM work too. Tight pre-hire requirements across the board.

**LU-237 Niagara Falls, NY** is lean but locked: 8 calls, 97 hands. Ferguson and O'Connell are both stacking Lake Mariner Data Center jobs at **$48.20/hr** (40 and 39 spots respectively), 7/10 schedule, per diem available. This is volume on a standing call.

**LU-379 Charlotte, NC** has 17 calls across three data centers: Gross Electric (MOC-1 Spartanburg, **$4 above scale**), Miller Electric (QTS Rock Hill, standing call), and Rosendin (MDN.06 Newton/Maiden, **$3.50/hr above scale** plus night shift premium). 

**The trend:** Data centers are consuming the board — 896 calls nationwide means cloud infrastructure build-out is still pushing hands hard. Milwaukee, Indianapolis, and the Northeast corridor are moving volume; southeastern data center cluster (Charlotte/Rock Hill) is solid premium work. Mid-market locals like Marietta (1 call, $100/hr at Thermo Fisher) show that specialty work pays, but density wins chasing right now.

LINEMAN.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Lineman Locals — Wednesday, July 8, 2026**

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** — The Polaris Forge data center is still eating hands. Parsons Electric's got 56 inside JW slots across three separate calls at **$44.80/hr**, but here's the real money: **$100/day per diem** (non-taxed) if you're 100+ miles out, plus **$100 weekday incentive and $150 Saturday bonus**. That's pushing effective hourly into the mid-50s on a 6-day week. 4-10s, solid depth at ~111 hands on the board.

**LU-583 El Paso, TX** — Inside work jumping: Summit Line and Cupertino Electric both posting **$55/hr** (40 and 10 calls respectively) on project work, while Rosendin's undercutting at **$40/hr** for 37 JW slots. All NM State JIW licensed. Book's fat at 114 hands, so you're looking Book 2 territory. OSHA 10 and drug screens across the board.

**LU-291 Boise, ID** — VECA's Micron PLA data center is the heavy lifter: 24 inside JW at **$45.33/hr** base, but **$170/day per diem** (seven days if eligible) and **$20/hr travel pay** on 4-10s. That's real money for semiskilled. Quality Electric's offering **$55.33/hr** shop work on St. Luke's Tower if you want local stability.

**LU-429 Nashville, TN** — Google Clarksville crew (NEWTRON) sitting on 50 "Other" calls at solid unknown scale, but **$120/day per diem** when 60+ miles out, 6-10s. Light book (60 hands), thin data on pay.

**LU-474 Memphis, TN** — Google West Memphis data center pulling 40 inside JW at **$36.65/hr** plus **$125/day incentive**, 4-10s + 2-8s. It's not top-tier pay, but the schedule's clean and data centers aren't stopping.

Data centers are consolidating the work—Polaris, Google, Micron are pulling volume everywhere. Lineman calls are slim; inside work's where the boards are moving.
